MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2003 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias/D. Boffi; Reporter: Floyd Butler. Paul Arshawsky, Esq. represented Plaintiff Conrad House Incorporated. Defendant Alan Lowe appeared in pro per. Also, present, Stephanie Lan, Property Manager. The case settled per written stipulation of the parties and which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
